title: Darkmesh DM1 DNS TXT Envelope (validated)

cfg.description: cfg tx id as currently accepted by dnsTxtParser.ts

kid.description: owner key id/address as currently accepted by dnsTxtParser.ts

x-runtimeRules: Raw TXT parser MUST reject duplicate keys.
Raw TXT parser MUST reject unknown keys.
Domain binding is resolved from _darkmesh.<domain> query context, not from envelope body.
